title: God’s Judgment Falls
description: Conis warns the Straw Hats about Skypiea’s law, and the crew is pulled deeper into God Enel’s territory.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this scene centers on Conis, McKinley, Luffy, Nami, Sanji. Conis warns the Straw Hats about Skypiea’s law, and the crew is pulled deeper into God Enel’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll do anything to repay you...

summary: Conis warns the Straw Hats about Skypiea’s law, and the crew is pulled deeper into God Enel’s territory.
